subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled by the fire of guidance from the blessed Tree on Mount Sinai! Thy letter was received, and verily, with heart and soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقتبس نار هدی از شجره مبارکه سینا نامه ملاحظه گردید فی الحقیقه بجسم و جان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
